subject: session date
fact: The session takes place on Nov 22nd, 2025.
source_quote: Date: Nov 22nd, 2025

subject: Malkyn Grenefeld
fact: Malkyn Grenefeld was defeated by the party.
source_quote: victory over Malkyn Grenefeld

subject: Graz'zt
fact: Graz'zt's presence faded from the material plane after threatening vengeance.
source_quote: Graz'zt had threatened terrible vengeance before his presence faded from the material plane

subject: Red Plume guards
fact: The Red Plume guards were caught between fractured factions uncertain of their place in the new order.
source_quote: Red Plume guards found themselves caught between fractured factions, uncertain of their place in the new order

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana is the head of the Thieves Guild.
source_quote: Isthana, the head of the Thieves Guild

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana appeared in the blood-soaked temple where the final battle had taken place.
source_quote: Isthana, the head of the Thieves Guild, appeared in the blood-soaked temple where the final battle had taken place

subject: Isthana's offer
fact: Isthana offered the party positions in Hillsfar's new political order.
source_quote: When she offered them positions in Hillsfar's new political order

subject: Daein
fact: Daein declined the offer of a position in Hillsfar's new political order.
source_quote: Daein declined immediately, stating he preferred to keep his head attached to his body

subject: equipment acquisition
fact: Isthana offered to help the party acquire equipment from the castle's stores.
source_quote: instead offered to help them acquire equipment from the castle's stores

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas received enchanted bracers and superior leather armor from the castle's stores.
source_quote: with Akritas receiving enchanted bracers and superior leather armor

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim was outfitted with magical plate mail from the castle's stores.
source_quote: while Bramgrim and Daein were outfitted with magical plate mail

subject: Daein
fact: Daein was outfitted with magical plate mail from the castle's stores.
source_quote: while Bramgrim and Daein were outfitted with magical plate mail

subject: Red Plume standoff
fact: Red Plume guards stood ready to challenge the party at the castle's main gate.
source_quote: Red Plume guards stood ready to challenge them

subject: Red Plume retreat
fact: The Red Plume guards stepped aside after recognizing the heroes.
source_quote: they wisely stepped aside

subject: garishly painted smithy
fact: The party commissioned custom armor for their owlbear companion at a garishly painted smithy.
source_quote: The party made their way to a garishly painted smithy, where they commissioned custom armor for their owlbear companion

subject: Charles
fact: Charles arrived with urgent news from the Emerald Enclave.
source_quote: Charles arrived with urgent news from the Emerald Enclave

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: The Drow brought intelligence to the Emerald Enclave regarding Graz'zt's machinations.
source_quote: Charles arrived with urgent news from the Emerald Enclave. After some overly dramatic congratulations on their victory, he revealed that the Drow had brought terrifying intelligence

subject: fire giant army creation
fact: Graz'zt infused fire giants with his own blood to create an army.
source_quote: The demon lord had infused fire giants with his own blood, creating an army

subject: meeting arrangement
fact: Charles directed the party to meet representatives at the Silver Shadow Cave near Elventree.
source_quote: He directed the party to meet representatives at the Silver Shadow Cave near Elventree

subject: Silver Shadow Cave
fact: The Silver Shadow Cave is located near Elventree.
source_quote: Silver Shadow Cave near Elventree

subject: sacred cave of Selûne
fact: The party traveled to the sacred cave of Selûne.
source_quote: The party traveled to the sacred cave of Selûne

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a Drow with silver hair, emerald green eyes, and skin so dark it appeared nearly purple.
source_quote: Murssvayas Dhuurniv, a Drow with silver hair, emerald green eyes, and skin so dark it appeared nearly purple

subject: owlbear recognition
fact: The owlbear seemed to recognize Murssvayas Dhuurniv with unusual familiarity.
source_quote: including the owlbear, who seemed to recognize him with unusual familiarity

subject: Szith Morcane
fact: The Drow outpost of Szith Morcane was sacked by an army of slaves led by fiendish fire giants and demons.
source_quote: the Drow outpost of Szith Morcane had been sacked by an army of slaves led by fiendish fire giants and demons

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is the leader of the Szith Morcane outpost.
source_quote: The outpost's leader, Solom Ned'razak

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak is an incredibly powerful wizard.
source_quote: an incredibly powerful wizard

subject: Solom's flight
fact: Solom Ned'razak fled to the Sporedome after the sacking of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: had fled to the fungal forest known as the Sporedome

subject: Sporedome
fact: The Sporedome is a fungal forest where survivors of Szith Morcane gathered.
source_quote: fled to the fungal forest known as the Sporedome, where other survivors had gathered

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is the chief alchemist of the Drow.
source_quote: their chief alchemist, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Xaven's capture
fact: Xaven Tanor'this was captured during the raid on Szith Morcane.
source_quote: had been captured during the raid

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass is a creature who operates an extraplanar brokerage.
source_quote: sold to a creature named Maram il Vass, who operated an extraplanar brokerage

subject: Den of the Whispered Word
fact: The Den of the Whispered Word is an extraplanar brokerage in the Howling Pits.
source_quote: an extraplanar brokerage called the Den of the Whispered Word in the twisted realm known as the Howling Pits

subject: Howling Pits
fact: The Howling Pits is a twisted realm where the Den of the Whispered Word is located.
source_quote: in the twisted realm known as the Howling Pits

subject: pendant
fact: Murssvayas produced a pendant that Bramgrim recognized as belonging to Solom Ned'razak.
source_quote: the Drow produced a pendant that Bramgrim recognized as belonging to Solom Ned'razak

subject: mission agreement
fact: The party agreed to rescue Xaven Tanor'this and help reclaim Szith Morcane.
source_quote: the party ultimately agreed to undertake the perilous mission

subject: reward promise
fact: Solom Ned'razak promised the party an item from the legendary Drow horde if they successfully rescued Xaven and reclaimed Szith Morcane.
source_quote: The Drow wizard had promised that if the party successfully rescued Xaven and helped reclaim Szith Morcane, they would be granted an item from the legendary Drow horde

subject: Daein
fact: Daein questioned whether Solom Ned'razak's promise could be trusted.
source_quote: Though Daein questioned whether this promise could be trusted

subject: Pass Without Trace revelation
fact: Akritas revealed she can cast Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: Akritas reveals she can cast Pass Without Trace

subject: stealth bonus
fact: Pass Without Trace grants the entire party a plus 10 to stealth.
source_quote: granting the entire party a plus 10 to stealth

subject: Daein
fact: Daein realized he now has a plus 20 stealth bonus due to Pass Without Trace.
source_quote: shocking Daein who realizes he now has a plus 20 stealth bonus
